productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Black Absolion Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThe Absolion TRX FG shoes are designed in full grain leather upper and is a part of the brand's adidas Predator range. This line is based on a prototype concept from former footballer Craig Johnston. These soccer cleats have a great ball feel and soft Fit because of rubber patches on the shoe upper which increases the friction between the foot and the ball. Product DetailsFull grain upper for comfort and a good fitAdidas 3-Stripe at the sides of the midfitPredator technology in the forefoot for power, swerve and ball contactAsymmetrical lacing system for better ball contactPre molded EVA sockliner with nubuck touch heel liningTraxion FC outsole for grip and comfortPlastic cleats
